prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BTMRFLGP10IN-GRN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Bottom Dual Riffle Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green Description: A new addition to ASR Outdoor gold prospecting pans, this 10 inch dual riffle gold pan features deep side wall riffles for capturing larger gold nuggets or valuable materials, which are complemented by micro riffles on the bottom of the pan, designed to capture fine specs, nuggets or flakes of gold.

This high impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel or other metal gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof, buoyant in water and features a built in carabiner clip hole for easy portability alongside your other gold prospecting equipment. Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

- Deep Large Riffles - Catch large gold nuggets before they wash away separating the black sand and gold from lighter colored sediments
- Wide Belly Pan Bottom - Helps to clearly see the gold that collects in the bottom corners as it becomes separated from the remaining black sand, pay dirt or other materials
- Micro Bottom Riffles - This unique pan features bottom micro riffles designed to capture fine gold flecks and small gold nuggets

This gold pan is great for practicing panning techniques, as well as extraction and recovery, as the specifically designed bottom micro riffles will capture small gold nuggets or flakes with ease. Suitable for new hobbyists or experienced gold prospectors looking to try out a new tool. Good luck. Search Terms: fine gold flake nugget plastic washing pan black sand clean out recovery mining equipment prospector mine claim bulk sluice box tools classifier screen camping hobby sluice box metal detector accessories miners moss alaskian paydirt paydirt Features: - BOTTOM RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Gold pan incorporates deep side wall riffles, complemented by micro bottom riffles, allowing for capture of both fine gold or larger gold nuggets and valuable minerals - PROFESSIONAL GOLD PAN: Molded from one piece high impact ABS plastic, this gold pan is lightweight, rust and UV resistant while also being buoyant in water - PAY DIRT GOLD NUGGETS: Dual riffle gold pan technology allows for all sizes of alluvial gold particles to be efficiently collected without missing fine specs - PORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Built in carabiner hole allows for gold pan to easily attach to backpack or gold prospecting equipment via carabiner clip or other - BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10in Green Dual Riffle Gold Pan

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-in Green Dual Riffle Gold Pan

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dual Riffle Technology, Captures Fine Gold And Nuggets, Lightweight ABS Plastic, UV And Rust Resistant, Portable Carabiner Clip

openai.title_differentiation: Deep Side Wall Riffles, Micro Bottom Riffles, ABS Plastic, Rust And UV Resistant, Buoyant, Carabiner Hole
